author: aleju
prompt_text: Target unreachable conditional blocks by introducing deeply nested arithmetic operations that evaluate to false. Modify the internal data type conversions within these dead code regions to alter token patterns without affecting the executed program output. Ensure these modifications disrupt the feature vectors in Neural Networks and Naive Bayes without altering active logic.
